flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Virginia Wesleyan University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (43.9% → 36.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Virginia Wesleyan University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (46.8% → 41.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Virginia Wesleyan University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Virginia Wesleyan University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (66.1% → 74.2%).
